name: Silver Predator Corp.
description: Silver Predator Corp. is a Canadian-based junior mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of precious metal properties. The company maintains a diverse portfolio of exploration projects situated within prominent mineral trends in Nevada, as well as a significant copper-silver exploration project located in the world-class Silver Valley District of Northern Idaho. As an exploration-stage entity, Silver Predator Corp. is dedicated to identifying and advancing high-potential gold, silver, lead, zinc, and copper deposits, leveraging its strategic assets to create value within the North American mining sector.
